name: Собери меня — Кира одна на красном мате

visual_parameters.subject: 1girl, athletic 24yo woman, blonde curly hair, messy wet hair, crying, tears on cheeks, wet eyelashes, closed eyes or half-open, vulnerable expression
visual_parameters.pose: sitting on red leather mat, hugging knees, head down, body curled in ball, barefoot, arms wrapped around legs, forehead on knees or chin on knees
visual_parameters.clothing: black crop top displaced, slid up exposing lower ribs and stomach, black shorts displaced, bunched up, wet fabric clinging to skin, visible sweat on skin
visual_parameters.environment: empty gym, night, completely dark background, fluorescent lights from above, red mat center frame, mirror wall in background reflecting her silhouette, faint gym equipment shapes
visual_parameters.lighting: dramatic top lighting, cold blue white fluorescent, single warm amber accent from distant emergency lamp, Rembrandt lighting, chiaroscuro, face partially in shadow, body partially illuminated
visual_parameters.mood: psychological drama, destruction, rebirth, aftercare, vulnerability, strength in brokenness, post-breakdown, solitude, heavy silence
visual_parameters.style: photorealistic, cinematic, film grain, 8k, Black Swan aesthetic, David Dubnitskiy style, Whiplash atmosphere

safety_notes: U5 aftercare. Emotional vulnerability, crying, but no explicit nudity. Focus on psychological state, not sexual content. Red mat as symbol of passion/pain. Displaced clothing shows ribs and stomach but not intimate areas. Artistic, not erotic.
